title: On My Way!: A Wee World Full of Vehicles: 1 (Wee Gallery Cloth Books), White
features: AN ESSENTIAL ACTIVITY : this creative set will allow children aged seven and up to make five beautiful designs on the theme of mermaids and dolphins using a mixture of small round, square, matte and gloss mosaic pieces. The box includes contains an explanatory booklet with templates and instructions

DEXTERITY AND CONCENTRATION : this manual activity has been designed specially for children aged seven and up. It is designed to develop essential skills for kids in this age group, including concentration, dexterity, fine motor skills, precision and observational skills. It’s a playful and original way to support young children with essential learning. It’s also ideal for keeping kids amused on a rainy day, or at parties and birthday teas

CREATIONS TO BE PROUD OF : as the mosaic tiles are glued to the templates, children will see a beautiful design starting to take shape. Their work will pay off handsomely, and they will be proud to unveil their beautiful creations, which they can give away as presents or use to decorate their rooms

CHARACTERISTICS : contains five templates, more than 2400 foam mosaic pieces (in 10 sets), five adhesive hooks, one instruction booklet and templates. Material(s) used : cardboard, Foam, Plastic. Recommended age range : ages seven years and up

LES ATELIERS DU CALME : this creative kit belongs to the collection “Les Ateliers Du Calme” developed in collaboration with Hachette editions. A company known for its know-how in creative leisure for children, which knows how to adapt to the needs and expectations of each age, both in terms of activities and themes
description: From the manufacturer Les Ateliers du Calme by Janod About the Ateliers Du Calme collection Creative activities such as colouring, modelling clay and even scratch cards are just some of the numerous other arts & crafts offered in the Les Ateliers du Calme collection. These enriching and colourful activities will keep your children occupied for hours on end, whilst teaching them self-discipline, concentration and precision. Janod’s entire "Les Ateliers du Dalme" collection has been developed in collaboration with Éditions Hachette . The further advantages of this collection Precision, dexterity, concentration, etc. Arts and crafts are valuable resources for children's learning and development. The "Les Ateliers du Calme" collection will help your child flourish as they create many different works of art with their own hands; each one different from the other. This diversity is conducive to open-mindedness, the continual discovery of new art forms and above all, it lets children learn to apply patience and concentration to numerous specific projects. Discover the Janod Creative Leisure collections Les Ateliers du Calme Immerse your child in a serenity and calmness-conducive environment as they are tasked to make masks and complete other colouring activities with their hands: the goal of the Les Ateliers du Calme collection. Les Ateliers Bijoux Get ready and dressed up while sporting stylish accessories made by your child’s own hands... Your child will learn and be impressed with the creations from the Les Ateliers Bijoux collection. Les Ateliers Déco Hanging items, dream catchers and more. Each craft kit from the Les Ateliers Déco collection contains everything your child will need to create pretty works of art that will brighten the walls of their bedroom or the other rooms in the house. Mystérix All kinds of polygons - e.g. squares and diamonds mysteriously combine... Colourful characters are then revealed - little by little - in front of your child’s very eyes. The Mysterix collection has plenty of surprises in store for them. Janod is well played! Janod was established in the Jura region in 1970, and ever since, it has been creating and developing children’s early-learning toys. Growing up is the greatest adventure there is and Janod helps each and every toddler prepare for the world around them. Currently, the 100-person strong Janod team helps keep the company going with the promise of making children laugh and grow. Our Jura-based creative team works day in, day out, to invent games suitable for different age groups, and by carefully hand-picking the most alluring materials and colours, whilst specifying the skills required. Furthermore, we create games that besides being fun, also promote authentic joy-filled moments to share with others. We believe in the importance of educating children from a young age of the importance of conserving nature and protecting biodiversity, in order to build a future destined to last for both the children and our planet. For this reason, we create durable toys that use as much FSC-certified wood as possible and are reducing our packaging.
